AI Proxy stream logging preview
Stream Logs Schema

Provider-compatible gateway

Route model calls and coding-agent sessions through one place.

This preview simulates OpenAI, Anthropic, Claude Code, and Codex capture paths: streaming response logs, tool-session events, token metrics, and coaching signals.

Health Checking…
Mode Mock stream
Routes /openai · /anthropic · /tool-events
Input tokens 1,248 prompt + context
Output tokens 72 streamed answer
First token 318 ms latency signal
Coaching signal High context ratio review candidate

Live stream inspector

Watch chunks pass through the proxy

Idle

Reconstructed response

Choose a provider to start the simulated stream.

Raw SSE events

No events yet.

Audit records

JSONL-style records for analytics

Production shape

Provider logs plus tool-session events

Use provider request records for authoritative token usage, then join tool events from Claude Code and Codex by user, team, app, repo, session, and timestamp. 

id · timestamp · provider · model · user_id · team_id
stream · duration_ms · first_token_ms
input_tokens · output_tokens · cached_tokens
request_summary · response_summary · error

tool · event_type · session_id · cwd · repo
prompt_summary · command · files · metadata
coaching_signals[] · severity · evidence
